async function loadContent() { try { // Fetch the updated json file generated by your portal const response = await fetch('./content.json'); if (!response.ok) return; const items = await response.json(); const displayContainer = document.getElementById('my-feed'); // Make sure you have an element with this ID displayContainer.innerHTML = items.map(item => { if (item.type === 'photo') { return `

${item.title}

`; } else if (item.type === 'video') { return `

${item.title}

`; } else if (item.type === 'blog') { return `

${item.title}

${item.content}

`; } }).join(''); } catch (e) { console.error("Error loading updates:", e); } } window.onload = loadContent;
